name: Tomato, Basil, and Mozzarella Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices, making about 4 slices per tomato.
2. Arrange 2-3 slices on each salad plate.
3. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella over each slice of tomato.
4. Cut fresh basil leaves into strips and top each tomato with basil.
5. Drizzle olive oil over the tomatoes and add a dash of pepper.
6. Enjoy!
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 MEDIUM-FAT-MEAT EXCHANGE.
CHO: 6; PRO: 5g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 70;
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is suitable.
Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S. and Katharine Middleton.
